Engineer's Ring  
 

Lore Item No Trade
Slot: FINGER
AC: 20
STR: +5 DEX: +5 STA: +5 CHA: +5 WIS: +5 INT: +5 AGI: +5 HP: +5 MANA: +20 ENDUR: +20
WT: 0.1 Size: TINY
Class: WAR CLR PAL SHD ROG NEC WIZ MAG ENC
Race: GNM FRG
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Engineer's Ring
Lore Item No Trade
Slot: FINGER
AC: 20
STR: +5 DEX: +5 STA: +5 CHA: +5 WIS: +5 INT: +5 AGI: +5 HP: +5 MANA: +20 ENDUR: +20
WT: 0.1 Size: TINY
Class: WAR CLR PAL SHD ROG NEC WIZ MAG ENC
Race: GNM FRG
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)

Item Lore:Ring of an engineer
Item Type:Armor
Stackable:No
Lucy Entry By:Agamenoar
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2021-07-27 02:17:49
Page Updated:Wed Apr 26th, 2017

Expansion: Scars of Velious
Rarity: Rare
Level to Attain: 46
[Drops | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

NPC Name
a forlorn revenant
Innoruuk - Plane of Hate

Plane of Hate B
NPC Name
a phantom chest
a vengeance golem
a vile rat

# Jun 01 2002 at 1:13 PM Rating: Decent

I want it, I want it, I want it
QuoteReply
# May 14 2001 at 9:12 PM Rating: Good
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
I play a gnome enchanter, and look for the following stats in an item. Cha first, then int, then HP, then AC, then mana, this beauty has all 5 and one hell of an AC to boot. The second best ring AC wise is 10. I would take on Inny with nothing but a RTS and a Gossimer robe if I thought for one second I would get this ring. Of course that second is as long as Ill last against him, but Im sure you get the point.

▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: May 13 2001 at 2:16 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) after my last post i realized it was #99 so i had to post something just to break 100 . so what better item to post on than this fine piece of jewlry*drools wishing he was a gnome*.
#Anonymous, Posted: May 13 2001 at 11:31 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Also look at that Half Elf mask! I love Half Elves and that mask sucks and so do Half Elves (but I still love em =~)! hehe
#Anonymous, Posted: May 13 2001 at 11:30 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Hate to brake it to yah, but its true... Ogres are not rare, along with barbarians and trolls they are the only tank that can bash without a shield. Plus they are one of the most appealing choices for a warrior or SK because of their high strength, duh! =P Anyways Verant is not trying to reward any race higher than the other, thats not how they work. To make people want to play one race/class as much as another Verant makes the less appealing race/class better or more appealing... At least thats what they try to do
Half Elf

▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: May 11 2001 at 6:13 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) GNOMERCY!!
#Anonymous, Posted: May 11 2001 at 5:55 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Damn. I need a new Iron Ring.
#Anonymous, Posted: May 11 2001 at 5:41 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Wish my RL Iron ring gave those kinds of stats.
rare races rewarded
QuoteReply
# May 11 2001 at 3:50 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
It seems these "race only" items from Inny are a reward for playing a rare race. For example, the gnome and ogre items (Earring of Bashing: Wt 0.10. +5 AC, +8 Str, +8 Wis, +5 vsMg, +5 vsFire, +5 vsCold, +5 vsPos, +5 vsDis) are very nice...while the wood elf (Hotof's Bracer: Wt 1.00. +10 AC, +10 Str, +10 Wis, +10 Cha, +15 vsFire, +15 vsCold) and high elf items (Ring of Pureblood: Wt 0.10. +3 AC, +5 Str, +5 Wis, +5 Int, +5 Cha, +30 HP, +30 Mana) are okay, but not that great.

Just a subtle way to reward those that choose a rarer race than wood elf or high elf.

Since my main is a barbarian, I'm pretty pleased with our item:

Icebelt: Wt 2.00. +10 AC, +10 Str, +10 Agi, +10 Dex, +10 Wis, +5 vsMg, +5 vsFire, +5 vsCold, +5 vsPos, +5 vsDis

The resists are very nice, but the AC and wis is equivalent to the easy to attain Flayed Turmoil Skin belt, not a bad item at all, just not stellar like the gnome drop or a nice AC/wis increase in a spot that doesnt have a lot of options like the Ogre earring.

I would say trolls are a little more rare than barbies, check out their belt:

Skinner's Belt: Wt 1.00. +12 AC, +15 Str, +15 Wis, +20 vsPos, +20 vsDis, +20 HP, +20 Mana

More AC, more str, more wis...of course, the +5 MR on the barbie belt is nice, but I think the troll belt is much better.
▲ Page top
not quite equivalent to turmoil id rather have this lol
QuoteReply
# Jan 21 2002 at 10:07 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591758069684
3 posts
Flayed Tourmoilskin Belt +9 AC +6 Dex +5 Wis

Icebelt: Wt 2.00. +10 AC, +10 Str, +10 Agi, +10 Dex, +10 Wis, +5 vsMg, +5 vsFire, +5 vsCold, +5 vsPos, +5 vsDis

But you already knew this as old as this thread is.

RE: rare races rewarded
QuoteReply
# May 17 2001 at 1:26 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591751616788
9 posts
Unless I am reading this wrong, the Ogre drop is an EARring... 5 AC on an earring, plus those stats, makes for a very nice item indeed. 20 AC on a ring is, admittedly, pretty darn exceptional, but VI seems to be very willing to put high AC's on rings lately.

Tsebach Silverwolf
52 Warrior in the service of Tunare
Spirit of the Moon
Innoruuk

QuoteReply
# May 11 2001 at 3:42 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591755682992
37 posts
Takes 4-5 years of university to get an engineer's ring. All gnomes have to do is kill inny. Seems unfair.
▲ Page top
RE: engineer?
QuoteReply
# May 13 2001 at 8:19 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
If you compare norrath's time flow, to earth's I think you will notice it takeing a good bit longer (relatively) to get this item than to get an academic award, which (in my understanding) is always rewarded if you know your trade and pass all the tests (you dont have to spend 3 more relative years getting it to drop and succeeding at a random) just my 2 cents, and the gnome cand even engineer a hole in a wall even if they specialize in hurling destructive energy, so who's is better?
▲ Page top

QuoteReply

__DEL__1591753721493
